title: CASP project state
description: casp/state.json — the machine-readable source of truth the CASP validator reads. Deterministic, git-native, local-only. This schema documents the shape; casp check verifies the claims against git.

updated_at.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the last state bump.

last_session_id.description: The id of the most recent session; must map to <logs_dir>/<id>.md. The placeholder 'pending' is allowed before the first session closes.

last_commit.description: The commit the recorded state corresponds to. Must exist in git history (HEAD, or the parent of HEAD via a state-bump commit). The placeholder 'pending' is allowed before the first push.

current_phase.description: The phase the project is currently on.

next_phase.description: The next phase to ship, or null when parked (launch hold, roadmap complete).

next_prompt.description: Repo-relative path to the next session prompt, or null when parked. Must exist and must not already be status: shipped.

phases_shipped.description: Phases already delivered. Must contain no duplicates.

migrations_applied.description: Migration identifiers (filenames without extension) recorded as applied. Verified against migrations_dir when both are set.

sessions_dir.description: Override for the session-prompts directory. Defaults to docs/plan/sessions.

logs_dir.description: Override for the session-logs directory. Defaults to session-logs.

migrations_dir.description: The migrations directory, if the project tracks migrations. No default — a project with no migration concept sets neither this nor migrations_applied.

notes.description: Free-form human notes about the current state. Not validated.
